title: androsace carnea subsp. laggeri
intro: Androsace carnea subsp. laggeri, also known as Lagger's Rock Jasmine, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the alpine regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Androsace carnea subsp. laggeri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
